params.name: M-theory
params.description:
On Dec 9, 1995 AD, American physicist Edward Witten introduced the M-theory.
The M-theory is a theoretical framework seeking to unify fundamental forces and particles in the universe, aiming to unveil the mysteries of a multi-dimensional cosmos. It builds upon string theory, proposing that all fundamental particles arise from the vibrations of tiny strings. These strings vibrate in higher-dimensional space, while our perceived four-dimensional spacetime is just one facet of this higher-dimens …
